org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query.CassandraScrollPosition

Packages that use CassandraScrollPosition
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query
Apache Cassandra specific query and update support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.query
Query derivation mechanism for Apache Cassandra specific repositories.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CassandraScrollPosition
    CassandraPageRequest.getScrollPosition()
    Returns the underlying CassandraScrollPosition.
    static CassandraScrollPosition
    CassandraScrollPosition.initial()
    Returns an initial CassandraScrollPosition.
    static CassandraScrollPosition
    CassandraScrollPosition.of(com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.cql.PagingState pagingState)
    Creates a continuation CassandraScrollPosition given CassandraScrollPosition.PagingScrollPosition.
    static CassandraScrollPosition
    CassandraScrollPosition.of(ByteBuffer pagingState)
    Creates a continuation CassandraScrollPosition given pagingState.

    Method
    Description
    Query

    Set the paging state to skip rows.
